requires 'Plack', '1.0';
requires 'JSON', '>= 2.00, < 2.80';
recommends 'JSON::XS', '2.0';
conflicts 'JSON', '< 1.0';

on 'test' => sub {
  requires 'Test::More', '>= 0.96, < 2.0';
};

feature 'sqlite', 'SQLite support' => sub {
  recommends 'DBD::SQLite';
};

build_requires 'Module::Build', '0.42';
